scope: GSC-derived only (51 snapshots, 2026-05-07 to 2026-07-09, property www.bariatriccounselingcenter.com) plus keywords-master.json. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual. Counts labeled 'keywords' are keyword counts, never page counts.
wins: Three tracked keywords hold #2-3: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' (2.0) and 'weight loss counseling san antonio' (2.0) on the homepage, plus 'bariatric therapist' (3.5); five more sit in #4-10 including 'bariatric counselor' (7.5) and 'bariatric counseling near me' (9.5).

'bariatric counseling' -- the highest-impression tracked term (21 impressions) -- improved from 17.8 to 14.2 (delta +3.6), and 'weight loss counseling or therapy' jumped from 11.6 to 4.7 (delta +6.9) onto page 1.

'weight loss counseling' (+10.9 to 30.2, 8 impressions) and 'holistic approach to weight loss' (+10.3 to 25.2, 5 impressions) both posted double-digit position gains -- the 2026-05-20/25 national page builds are gaining traction.
Blog content carries the visibility: the hydration post has 4,159 impressions / 18 clicks at position 5.2 and the self-esteem post 733 impressions at 7.2 -- both page-1 assets.

The overeaters keyword family (7 terms added 2026-07-08 per Todd) is now tracked and pointed at live pages; 'overeaters help' already shows a GSC impression on /food-addiction-treatment-in-texas/ at position 38.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 26 of 82 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 56 show none. This is a keyword count, not a page count -- many keywords share one target page, and most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live on www (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic). The denominator grew 75 to 82 with the 07-08 overeaters additions, so the no-data count rising 50 to 56 is mostly new terms, not lost visibility.

Visibility drift across the timeline: impressions 2,447 (05-07) -> 1,934 (07-09, about -21%) and impression-weighted avg position 14.87 -> 22.30 first vs last snapshot. Single-day snapshots on low-impression terms swing day to day; directional only.
Near-zero CTR: 4 clicks on 1,934 impressions (~0.2%) in the latest snapshot; the sleep blog post has 1,300 impressions at position 10.8 with 0 clicks.

Slipped commercial terms: 'food addiction treatment' 60.3 -> 75.0 (delta -14.7, 4 impressions), 'bariatric counseling near me' 5.8 -> 9.5 (delta -3.8, 6 impressions), 'weight loss therapy san antonio' 17.0 -> 28.0 (delta -11.0, 2 impressions). Low impression counts make these directional, not definitive.
'eating disorder counseling san antonio' sits at 24.9 with 12 impressions and is drifting (delta -1.2) -- a real-volume local term stuck on page 3.
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene: 2 keywords ('weight loss counselor', 'bariatric counselor') still target staging12 URLs with status pending-post; once those pages are live on www, repoint the targetUrls in keywords-master.json so GSC can match. If a staging-to-prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes -- do not infer a count from keyword data.

Fix CTR from the blog engine: add CTAs and internal links from the high-impression posts (hydration 4,159 impressions / pos 5.2, sleep 1,300 impressions / 0 clicks, self-esteem 733 impressions) into the matching service pages (weight-loss-therapy, emotional-eating, nutritional-counseling) to convert page-1 impressions into clicks.

On-page refresh for the slipped terms with real impressions: 'bariatric counseling near me' (page-1 defense at 9.5, 6 impressions) and 'eating disorder counseling san antonio' (24.9, 12 impressions) -- title/meta and content-freshness pass.

Defend the core local #2-3 terms ('bariatric counseling san antonio', 'weight loss counseling san antonio' at 2.0) -- keep homepage content and internal links current; these are the closest terms to #1.
Add FAQ schema (bcc-faq-schema plugin) to top service pages lacking it for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility.
summary: 26 of 82 tracked keywords (keyword count, not pages) show GSC data; three terms hold #2-3 and 'bariatric counseling' improved to 14.2, but site-wide impressions are down about 21% since early May with avg position drifting to 22.3 and CTR near zero -- priorities are the 2 remaining staging tracker pointers plus CTA/internal-link work on the high-impression blog posts.
